name: oma-run
description: Open Managed Agents: durable, forkable agent workflows

scripts.clean: rm -rf dist packages/*/dist packages/*/*.tsbuildinfo packages/adapters/*/dist packages/adapters/*/*.tsbuildinfo examples/*/dist examples/*/*.tsbuildinfo
scripts.check: bun run clean && bun test && bun run build && bun run clean && git diff --check
